name: 📚 Science Hub — Local Files → Drive → Ingest

parameters.query:
WITH picked AS (
  SELECT id FROM automation_queue
  WHERE status='pending'
  ORDER BY added_at ASC
  LIMIT 5
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
)
UPDATE automation_queue q
SET status='processing', started_at=NOW()
FROM picked
WHERE q.id = picked.id
RETURNING q.*;

parameters.jsCode:
const fileId = $node['Upload to Drive'].json.id;
return [{ json: { pdfUrl: `https://drive.google.com/file/d/${fileId}/view?usp=sharing` } }];

parameters.query: UPDATE automation_queue SET status='failed', error='file_missing', processed_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{$json.id}}';

UPDATE automation_queue
SET retry_count = COALESCE(retry_count,0) + 1,
    status = CASE WHEN COALESCE(retry_count,0) + 1 >= 3 THEN 'failed' ELSE 'pending' END,
    error = CASE WHEN COALESCE(retry_count,0) + 1 >= 3 THEN 'quiz_failed' ELSE 'quiz_retry' END,
    processed_at = CASE WHEN COALESCE(retry_count,0) + 1 >= 3 THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END,
    started_at = NULL
WHERE id='{{$node["Derive Metadata"].json.id}}';
UPDATE automation_queue SET status='failed', error='youtube_not_found', processed_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{$node["Derive Metadata"].json.id}}';

SELECT course_code,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='pending')   AS pending,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='processing') AS processing,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='done')      AS done,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='failed')    AS failed,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM automation_queue
GROUP BY course_code
ORDER BY course_code;
UPDATE lessons SET is_published = true WHERE id='{{$json.lessonId}}';
